Lifeism 2.0 is the planned physical implementation of [[Lifeism]] in the future after [[Lifeism 1.0]] has been implemented.
[[Category:History]]
[[sn:Lifeism 2.0]][[Category:Lifeism 2.0]]
[[sn:Lifeism 2.0]]==Practices==
{{Deprecated doctrine}}
<!-- this section comes originally from the [[Lifeism]] article and needs editing -->
=== Princes and Princesses ===
Members born from two crowned members are called Princes or Princesses. There are specific programs for raising them

=== Nature Services ===
Services are proposed to be carried out in nature in a way that resembles [[Scouting]]. This is an intentional parallell linked to the LDS.

As of 2022 there are no static places of worship, with the closest thing being a proposal of franchised shrines analogous to [[Shinto shrine|Shinto shrines]]. Shrines in natural environments, and shrines in greenhouses in urban environments. No such shrines have been constructed yet.

=== Education ===
Continued education is an essential element of evolutionism. It has some parallels to the nature service scouting element and plays an essential role in [[sangha democracy]].

=== Videogames ===
Videogames are often used in Lifeism as a way to provide an immersive religious experience.
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
